jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Easyday
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Easyday! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Easyday:
Easyday is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Easyday!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
